_meta.notes: Hand-authored (not a live capture) used ONLY by the M3b career-detail golden dual-run (dual-run.test.tsx). career.status.strategies.all (CareerViewProvider.BuildStrategyList) never carries effectiveCostReputation (no cheap decompiled source for KSP's nonlinear rep curve — career-capture-extend-report.md); parseStrategies falls back to initialCostReputation when it's absent. one-active-room-for-more.json (used by the legacy-only snapshots.test.tsx) sets effectiveCostReputation to a genuinely DIFFERENT value than initialCostReputation for its active strategy, which the new wire can never reproduce — so a byte-identical dual-run needs a legacy fixture where effectiveCostReputation already equals initialCostReputation on every entry, matching what the fallback produces.

strategies.all.title: Fundraising Campaign
strategies.all.description: Reach out to the public for monetary donations.

strategies.all.title: Patriotism Drive
strategies.all.description: Instill a sense of national pride in the populace.
strategies.all.activateBlockedReason: Requires more reputation than the program has earned.
